intent: process the first sample with scanpy

blocks.text: I'll process the first sample (Patient 145, Day 0) with scanpy using the standard QC → normalization → HVG → PCA → clustering → UMAP pipeline.

blocks.content: {"status": "ok", "name": "scrna-qc-clustering", "body": "scRNA-seq QC+clustering (scanpy): read 10x; calculate_qc_metrics; filter n_genes>=200 & pct_mito<0.20; normalize_total(1e4)+log1p; highly_variable_genes; pca; neighbors; umap; leiden; rank_genes_groups. Plots: HVG plot and PCA variance side-by-side; UMAP colored by leiden; use sc.pl.* not hand-rolled matplotlib."}

blocks.text: Now let me present a plan for processing the first sample:

input.title: Scanpy QC and Clustering - Patient 145 Day 0
input.summary: Quality control, normalization, highly variable gene selection, dimensionality reduction, and Leiden clustering on the first COVID-19 sample.
input.rationale: Standard best-practice scRNA-seq processing pipeline to identify cell types and quality issues.
input.assumptions:
- First sample = GSM5746259 (Patient 145, Day 0; 7,532 cells)
- Standard QC thresholds: ≥200 genes/cell, <20% mitochondrial reads
- Normalization to 1e4 counts + log1p
- Leiden clustering (resolution 1.0 by default)
- PCA reduction for visualization

steps.title: Load first sample from combined dataset
steps.description: Extract Patient 145 Day 0 subset from the registered .h5ad

steps.title: Calculate QC metrics
steps.description: Compute n_genes, n_counts, and percent mitochondrial reads per cell

steps.title: QC filtering
steps.description: Remove cells with <200 genes or >20% mitochondrial reads
expected_outputs: Filtered cell count and genes retained

steps.title: PCA dimensionality reduction
expected_outputs: PCA plot showing variance explained by PC1/2, scree plot

steps.title: Compute neighborhood graph
steps.description: scanpy.pp.neighbors (15 neighbors, cosine metric on PCA)

steps.title: Generate visualizations
steps.description: Plot HVG dispersion, PCA variance, UMAP colored by cluster and QC metrics
expected_outputs: QC violin plots, HVG plot, PCA variance plot, UMAP by cluster

steps.title: Compute cluster markers
expected_outputs: Top marker genes per cluster table
